locations_inspected.name: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc.
findings: System type: Wet Pipe; Manufacturer: Viking; Age: 28 years; NFPA 13 Compliant: Yes
3 control valves inspected — all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
deficiencies: Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials — clear obstruction to restore required panel access clearance
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room — install all missing junction box covers and address exposed wiring

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection resulted in an overall PASS status. The wet pipe sprinkler system (Viking, 28 years old, NFPA 13 compliant) is operational with adequate water supply. Minor deficiencies noted include a supervisory signal issue, electrical panel clearance obstruction, and exposed wiring with missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.
